commands.review_summary:
This PR changes diagnostics to use a separate 10s event-loop max-delay threshold, clears diagnostic queueDepth on idle transitions, and adds focused tests for both behaviors.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main still uses the 1,000ms threshold for both P99 and max event-loop delay, and an idle transition after multiple queued increments leaves queueDepth above zero. I did not run the focused tests because this sweep is read-only.
commands.review_followup: Human follow-up is needed for stronger contributor real-behavior proof and maintainer validation against current main; there is no narrow code repair for ClawSweeper because the patch itself is focused.

target.title: fix: tune diagnostic liveness and idle queue depth
